title: CloakLLM Compliance Report
description: Structured regulatory-output schema produced by Shield.generate_compliance_report() (v0.8.0+). Designed to be auditor-consumable without CloakLLM-specific knowledge. Per-entry attestation block is shape-compatible with v0.8.1 ProvenanceReport (manifest-derived fields default to null until v0.8.1 KeyManifest ships).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this report was produced.

cloakllm_version.description: CloakLLM version that produced this report.

schema_version.description: Compliance-report schema version. Bumped on backward-incompatible changes.

audit_dir.description: Audit log directory the report was generated from.

from.description: Earliest timestamp in scope. Null if no entries in range.

to.description: Latest timestamp in scope. Null if no entries in range.

articles_in_scope.description: List of EU AI Act / GDPR articles the report aggregates over. Null = all articles found in the chain.

verdict.description: Whether the SHA-256 hash chain links across all in-scope entries verify.

anomalies.description: Human-readable descriptions of any chain breaks or schema violations.

per_article.description: Per-EU-AI-Act-article rollup. Keys are article identifiers (e.g. 'EU_AI_Act_Art_12', 'EU_AI_Act_Art_4a').

evidence_event_count.description: Number of audit entries claiming this article in their article_ref.

decision_count.description: Number of distinct decision_ids touching this article.

categories_detected.description: PII categories aggregated across all in-scope events for this article.

pii_in_log.description: Always false in compliance mode. true => COMPLIANCE VIOLATION.

bias_sessions.description: Article 4a only: count of bias_session_start events.

wipe_confirmed_pct.description: Article 4a only: percentage of bias_session_end events with wipe_confirmed=true.

findings_recorded.description: Article 4a only: count of bias_finding events.

decisions.description: Optional per-decision rollup keyed by decision_id. Only emitted when include_decisions=true (default false; large reports otherwise).

attestation.description: Aggregate attestation status across all in-scope entries. v0.8.0 reports signature checks only; v0.8.1+ adds KeyManifest-based provenance verification.

schema_version.description: Attestation block schema version. '1.0' = signature-only (v0.8.0); '1.1' = + KeyManifest (v0.8.1+).

provenance_summary.description: v0.8.1-forward-compat slot. v0.8.0 emits null-filled placeholders. v0.8.1 KeyManifest fills these.

verdict.description: Overall report verdict. COMPLIANT iff chain_integrity.verdict='verified' AND no per_article entry has pii_in_log=true AND signatures_valid == entries_with_certificates (when attestation enabled).

verdict_reasons.description: Empty when COMPLIANT. Lists each reason when NON_COMPLIANT.
